productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Wallets
description: Urban girls can't get enough of bold accents and this is the key to a memorable look. Update your wardrobe with this stylish wallet from United Colours Of Benetton. Dimensions : 21 cm X 12 cmMade of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester on the inside for durabilityHas one main zippered compartmentOne zippered pouch in the middle for coinsFour slip pockets on either sideSix credit card slots, three on either sideHigh glossy effectMetallic clasp with brand name on the frontCareDo not wash,bleach,iron,dry clean or tumble dryRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
